Tip: Instant A/B testing for modern web apps, enabling real-time feature and layout experiments without backend changes.

Tip is your ultimate tool for optimizing web applications through seamless A/B testing. Imagine being able to ideate different versions of your website's features and layouts instantly without any hassle, or maybe just make a circle somewhere to let developer know what to change? With Tip, this is now a reality. Here's why Tip is a game-changer:

🚀 Instant Variations: Effortlessly ideate and create multiple versions of your web app's features and layouts. See what resonates best with your users in real-time.

📊 Immediate Insights: Gain instant feedback on the performance of different variations. Make data-driven decisions quickly and efficiently.

🔧 Effortless Integration: Integrate Tip into your existing web applications with ease. No need for complex backend changes or redeployments.

🖥️ User-Friendly Interface: Navigate through a clean and intuitive interface designed for both technical and non-technical users. Setting up and managing A/B tests has never been easier.

🛠️ Comprehensive Toolset: Leverage a robust set of features including layout editing, AI-powered suggestions, drawing mode, and media handling to enhance your testing capabilities.

Whether you're a developer aiming to boost your web app's performance or a product manager focused on improving user engagement, Tip provides the tools you need to make informed decisions and deliver an exceptional user experience.
Detects music-like audio in the active tab and lowers the tab volume.

NoMusic helps reduce background music in browser tabs.

When enabled for the active tab, NoMusic analyzes tab audio locally in your browser, detects music-like sound, and lowers the tab volume. If speech is detected, it keeps the volume higher so voices remain easier to hear.

Useful for videos, streams, tutorials, podcasts with background music, and pages where music is louder than speech.

Features:
- Works per active tab
- Detects music-like audio locally
- Lowers volume when music is detected
- Keeps speech more audible
- Adjustable sensitivity
- Adjustable volume levels for speech and non-speech audio

Privacy:
NoMusic processes audio locally in your browser. Audio is not uploaded, stored, or sent to any server.
Vibe with your creativity. Create with PixelVibe using webcam, screen capture, and audio of your choice

Vibe with your creativity!

Introducing PixelVibe Recorder for Chrome: Unleash Your Creativity and Productivity with Seamless Video Capture.

Are you ready to take your web recording and content creation to the next level? PixelVibe Chrome Recorder is here to revolutionize the way you capture and share your digital experiences. With PixelVibe, we've combined cutting-edge technology with an effortless user experience to help you save time, express your creativity, and boost your productivity.

Capture Anything, Anytime, Anywhere:

PixelVibe empowers you to capture the full spectrum of your digital world. Whether it's a specific browser tab, an entire window, or your entire screen, our recorder seamlessly captures it all. You're not limited to just what's on your screen; PixelVibe also records crystal-clear audio and video from your webcam, so you can effortlessly integrate your own personal touch into your recordings.

High-Quality Output, Effortless Download:

PixelVibe doesn't just capture, it delivers your content in top-notch quality. Your recordings can be easily saved in both the efficient and lightweight WebP format or the widely compatible MP4 format. No need for complicated export settings; just one click, and your recording is ready to download, saving you valuable time for what truly matters – creating and sharing.

One-Click Download:

We understand that simplicity and convenience matter, so we've made it as easy as possible for you. With PixelVibe, you can download your recordings with a single click. No more hassle searching through menus or waiting for lengthy rendering processes. Just click, and your content is in your hands.

Fast and Easy Sign-Up with Google:

Time is precious, and we don't want you to waste a second. PixelVibe offers fast and convenient sign-up using your Google account. No lengthy forms, no password hassles – just one click to authenticate, and you're in. It's the quickest path to unlocking the full potential of PixelVibe.

Unleash Your Creativity:

PixelVibe is more than just a recorder; it's your canvas for creative expression. Whether you're a content creator, educator, business professional, or simply someone who loves to share experiences, PixelVibe empowers you to bring your ideas to life. Create engaging tutorials, immersive presentations, captivating gameplay videos, or heartfelt vlogs – the possibilities are endless.

Boost Productivity with Seamless Workflow:

PixelVibe integrates seamlessly into your Chrome browser, ensuring a smooth workflow. No need to switch between applications or wrestle with complicated settings. With PixelVibe's intuitive interface and single-click download, you can focus on your tasks and projects without any distractions.

Stay at the Cutting Edge:

We're committed to keeping PixelVibe at the forefront of technology. Our team constantly updates and improves our recorder to provide you with the latest features and enhancements. With PixelVibe, you're always on the cutting edge, ready to adapt to the ever-evolving digital landscape.

PixelVibe Chrome Recorder is your key to a more efficient, creative, and productive digital experience. Capture, create, and share your world effortlessly with our user-friendly interface, high-quality output options, and seamless Google Sign-in authentication. Say goodbye to time-consuming processes and hello to the future of digital content creation with PixelVibe. Try it today and experience the difference for yourself.
Boost and fine-tune tab audio with precision controls, presets, and a workspace dashboard.

Amplyx gives you precise control over tab audio so you can make quiet videos clearer, reduce overly loud sites, and keep your browsing comfortable.

Key features:
- Per-tab volume control with quick presets
- Side panel dashboard for a bigger control surface
- Keyboard shortcut to open the controller
- Saves your preferences locally

Great for:
- Video calls, tutorials, and streaming sites that are too quiet
- Balancing audio between multiple tabs
- Quickly switching between listening setups

Privacy:
- No accounts
- No selling of data
- Settings are stored locally (Chrome storage)
Learn languages faster with interactive captions - word lookup, translations, and clean transcripts in a beautiful sidebar.

Learn languages faster with interactive YouTube captions - click words for definitions, translations, and clean caption history.

Sidecap adds side captions to YouTube videos, letting you interact with captions directly instead of pausing, rewinding, or switching tabs. Click on any word to see its meaning, translation, and usage - all inline, without interrupting playback.

What Sidecap does
	•	Click words in captions to see definitions and translations
	•	Automatically replay the last few seconds for context
	•	Build a clean, readable caption history as the video plays
	•	Switch between learning and translation modes
	•	View captions in a lightweight sidebar alongside the video

Designed for language learning

Sidecap is built for learners who want to stay immersed:
	•	No intrusive pop-ups
	•	No cluttered translation panels
	•	Just clear explanations, right when you need them

Privacy-first

Sidecap runs locally in your browser.
	•	No accounts
	•	No tracking
	•	No data collection

Supported languages

English, French, Spanish, Italian, German

Currently supports YouTube captions.
